skills.name: Agent Self Assessment
skills.description: Operational safety and self-check workflow for OpenClaw agents.
skills.notes: Review source before enabling write-capable tools.

skills.name: Calendar
skills.description: Calendar skill example used as a simple starter integration.
skills.notes: Community package; keep disabled unless reviewed.

skills.name: Research First Decider
skills.description: Local curated skill that decides whether to reuse, fork, borrow, or build before implementation starts.
skills.notes: Local curated workflow skill for research-first implementation planning.

skills.name: Product Brief Writer
skills.description: Local curated skill for turning vague ideas into short, decision-ready product briefs.
skills.notes: Useful for turning raw ideas into scope, value, and rollout decisions.

skills.name: Doc Systematizer
skills.description: Local curated skill for converting messy notes into clean, reusable documentation.
skills.notes: Good for SOPs, FAQs, handoffs, and decision memos.

skills.name: Meeting Note Synthesizer
skills.description: Local curated skill for turning meeting transcripts into decisions, owners, and next steps.
skills.notes: Optimized for fast executive summaries and action-item extraction.

skills.name: Bug Triage Investigator
skills.description: Local curated skill for turning a bug report into severity, repro steps, and next debugging actions.
skills.notes: Designed to clarify symptoms and evidence before a fix is attempted.

skills.name: Release Readiness Checker
skills.description: Local curated skill for go/no-go shipping decisions with evidence, risks, and rollback readiness.
skills.notes: Useful for final release gates and launch reviews.

skills.name: Customer Support Replier
skills.description: Local curated skill for drafting calm, actionable customer replies to setup issues and support requests.
skills.notes: Keeps support replies clear without overpromising.

skills.name: Ops Runbook Copilot
skills.description: Local curated skill for turning deployments, incidents, and maintenance work into concrete runbooks.
skills.notes: Focused on prerequisites, execution order, checks, and rollback guidance.

skills.name: Repo Triage Coordinator
skills.description: Local curated skill for classifying incoming repo work into bugs, enhancements, chores, and blockers.
skills.notes: Useful for issue queue cleanup and backlog prioritization.

skills.name: Paper Scan
skills.description: Local curated skill for scanning a paper workspace into manifest records, topic clusters, and stage guesses before higher-order analysis.
skills.notes: First-entry workflow for stage-aware paper operations.

skills.name: Paper Novelty
skills.description: Local curated skill for originality review, nearest-neighbor risk, and conservative publishability judgment on research drafts and ideas.
skills.notes: Use before polishing to judge whether the idea is actually worth writing up.

skills.name: Paper Scaffold
skills.description: Local curated skill for converting messy research materials into a minimum complete paper scaffold with explicit support labels.
skills.notes: Implements left-adjoint completion for fragmented paper materials.

skills.name: Paper Evidence
skills.description: Local curated skill for inferring the minimum evidence, experiments, and scope constraints required to defend paper claims.
skills.notes: Implements right-adjoint validation for paper claims and contribution statements.

skills.name: Paper Orchestrator
skills.description: Local curated skill for running the minimum stage-aware paper pipeline and producing a consolidated report.
skills.notes: Coordinates scan, scaffold, and evidence steps into one reproducible run.

skills.name: Paper Experiment
skills.description: Local curated skill for converting claims and evidence gaps into a minimum publishable experiment matrix.
skills.notes: Builds concrete proof plans from paper claims and evidence gaps.

skills.name: Agency Frontend Developer
skills.description: Adapted local skill for accessible, responsive frontend implementation with explicit QA gates.
skills.notes: Adapted from agency-agents and stored as a local curated draft.

skills.name: Agency Reality Checker
skills.description: Adapted local skill for evidence-based readiness checks and release validation.
skills.notes: Adapted from agency-agents and stored as a local curated draft.

skills.name: Agency Orchestrator
skills.description: Adapted local skill for multi-phase coordination with explicit QA gates.
skills.notes: Adapted from agency-agents and stored as a local curated draft.

packs.name: Safe Starter Pack
packs.description: Minimal starter pack with one live, low-friction calendar skill.
packs.audience: Anyone who wants the shortest possible starter path.
packs.outcome: Proves the calendar skill can be installed with the smallest moving surface.
notes: Whitelisted starter pack for local testing.
Calendar is community-maintained and should be reviewed before first use.

packs.name: Demo Safe Pack
packs.description: Smallest known-good demo pack for default safe-mode installation checks.
packs.audience: Best for a first install and a fast confidence check.
packs.outcome: Proves the shortest install to attach path with the smallest moving surface.
notes: Intended for smoke tests and demo recordings.
Contains only live candidates verified during local validation.

packs.name: Ops Basics Pack
packs.description: Operational baseline with one safe default install and one gated suspicious helper.
packs.audience: Users who want a cautious baseline before expanding further.
packs.outcome: Combines a safe live install with one intentionally gated safety helper.
notes: agent-self-assessment is intentionally kept behind explicit suspicious approval.
calendar provides the live default-safe install path.

packs.name: Agency PoC Pack
packs.description: Local curated proof of concept pack adapted from agency-agents for implementation, verification, and orchestration workflows.
packs.audience: Teams validating multi-step implementation and QA orchestration.
packs.outcome: Demonstrates how curated workflow skills can coordinate delivery work.
notes: Uses local curated skills rather than live registry-only installs.
Demonstrates a safe adaptation path for third-party agent content.

packs.name: Knowledge Work Pack
packs.description: Local curated pack for research, briefs, docs, and meeting synthesis.
packs.audience: Founders, operators, researchers, and documentation-heavy teams.
packs.outcome: Turns notes, transcripts, and research into structured outputs.
notes: Good default pack for founders, operators, and knowledge workers.
All skills are local curated drafts that install without live registry dependency.

packs.name: Paper Factory Pack
packs.description: Local curated pack for stage-aware paper workspace scanning and originality review.
packs.audience: Researchers managing paper drafts, notes, and validation gaps.
packs.outcome: Moves messy paper material toward a staged, defensible research workflow.
notes: Start with manifest and stage detection before novelty or drafting work.
Includes scan, scaffold, evidence, experiment, and orchestration for fragmented paper materials.

packs.name: Delivery Engine Pack
packs.description: Local curated pack for implementation orchestration, bug triage, and release checks.
packs.audience: Product, engineering, QA, and shipping-focused teams.
packs.outcome: Supports triage, release readiness, and shipping discipline.
notes: Built to cover build-ship-fix loops with explicit QA gates.
Combines adapted agency workflow skills with local triage and release helpers.

packs.name: Business Ops Pack
packs.description: Local curated pack for support replies, operations runbooks, and cross-functional execution.
packs.audience: Support, operations, and cross-functional execution roles.
packs.outcome: Improves support replies, runbooks, and coordination clarity.
notes: Designed to make a fresh OpenClaw instance feel useful for real business work quickly.
Focuses on support, coordination, and operational clarity rather than raw tool count.
